headlines.title: Dr. Marty Makary is out as FDA commissioner
headlines.description: Dr. Marty Makary resigned as commissioner of the Food and Drug Administration in the fourth high-profile departure of a member of the Trump administration this year.

headlines.title: Where should hantavirus cruise ship passengers quarantine? Experts are divided
headlines.description: Eighteen Americans are now in quarantine in two federal centers after having returned home from the MV Hondius cruise ship.

headlines.title: Florida surgeon who removed wrong organ says he is ‘forever traumatized’ by patient’s death
headlines.description: Thomas Shaknovsky said in a deposition in November that he believed he was removing 70-year-old William Bryan’s spleen, not his liver.

headlines.title: He pitched military service with a promise of lifetime healthcare. When he needed it, the system failed.
headlines.description: For more than a decade, Guy Shoemaker pitched military service to potential new recruits with one key promise: healthcare for life.“You’re going to have medical and dental for the rest of your life,” said Shoemaker, a retired Army sergeant first class and recruiter who spent a year in Afghanistan.

headlines.title: ‘A watershed moment’: A pancreatic cancer drug is set to transform treatment
headlines.description: An experimental pancreatic cancer drug that’s been shown to double survival in patients with advanced stages of the disease is poised to revolutionize the way the cancer is treated, oncologists say.

headlines.title: Inside look at quarantine facility for cruise ship passengers
headlines.description: One of the passengers from the cruise ship hit with a deadly outbreak of Hantavirus posted a video showing what the accommodations are like at the special medical facility in Omaha where passengers are being monitored. NBC News’ Camila Bernal reports.

headlines.title: Grandparents advocate for vaccination by sharing childhood illness stories amid skepticism
headlines.description: Grandparents are sharing their stories of what it was like to endure diseases like polio and measles before vaccines. NBC News' Valerie Castro spoke to a member of 'Grandparents for Vaccines' who hopes she can help parents make the right decisions on vaccinations.

headlines.title: Dr. Marty Makary out as FDA commissioner
headlines.description: Dr. Marty Makary is out as FDA commissioner, according to two sources familiar with the matter, but it is unclear whether Makary NBC News’ Berkeley Lovelace Jr. reports on President Donald Trump’s frustration with Markary’s performance and his prior consideration to fire him.

headlines.title: Emily Blunt Opens Up on Stuttering: Still Something I Contend With
headlines.description: Actor Emily Blunt, along with Heather Grossman, the executive director of the American Institute for Stuttering, join TODAY to talk about Blunt’s very personal lifelong journey with stuttering and raising awareness of the neurological disability. They break down the common misconceptions of people with stutters, and Blunt opens up about the environments that still give her trouble with speaking fluency, including when saying her own name. headlines.title: The best running watches, tested over hundreds of miles
headlines.description: I’ve tested dozens of running watches from Garmin, Coros, Amazfit, Fitbit, Apple and more. Here are my top picks for beginners, races and ultra-athletes alike.

headlines.title: The best men’s walking shoes of 2026, tested and reviewed
headlines.description: Shop expert-recommended and staff-tested men’s walking shoes from Brooks, On, New Balance and Hoka.

headlines.title: I’ve tested dozens of workout headphones: These are the best
headlines.description: I tested over a dozen workout headphones from brands like Apple, Beats, and Shokz to find our top picks for running, biking, the gym and more.
